# terrible_community_general_rollbar_deployment (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment` (String) Name of the environment being deployed, for example `production`.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `revision` (String) Revision number/sha being deployed.
- `token` (String) Your project access token.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Deploy comment (for example what is being deployed).
- `rollbar_user` (String) Rollbar username of the user who deployed.
- `url` (String) Optional URL to submit the notification to.
- `user` (String) User who deployed.
- `validate_certs` (Boolean) If `false`, SSL certificates for the target URL are not validated. This should only be used on personally controlled sites using self-signed certificates.
